info.title: Catalyst Gateway
info.description:
# Catalyst Gateway API.

The Catalyst Gateway API provides realtime data for all prior, current and future Catalyst Voices voting events.

tags.name: Registration
tags.description: Registration and Role Based Access Control (RBAC) Operations.

get.description:
This endpoint is used to determine if the service has started properly
and is able to serve requests.

## Note

*This endpoint is for internal use of the service deployment infrastructure.
It may not be exposed publicly.*

429.description:
## Too Many Requests

The client has sent too many requests in a given amount of time.

schema.title: RateLimit HTTP header.
schema.description:
Allows this server to advertise its quota policies and the current
service limits, thereby allowing clients to avoid being throttled.

externalDocs.description: IETF Draft - RateLimit header fields for HTTP

schema.title: Retry-After Header
schema.description:
Http Date or Interval in seconds.
Valid formats:

* `Retry-After: <http-date>`
* `Retry-After: <delay-seconds>`

See: <https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Headers/Retry-After>

put.description:
This endpoint is used to control internal service inspection features.

## Note

*This endpoint is for internal use of the service deployment infrastructure.
It may not be exposed publicly.*

parameters.name: log_level
parameters.description: The log level to use for the service.  Controls what detail gets logged.

parameters.name: query_inspection
parameters.description:
Enable or disable Verbose Query inspection in the logs.  Used to find query
performance issues.

get.description:
This endpoint returns the total Cardano's staked ADA amount to the corresponded
user's stake address.

parameters.name: stake_address

schema.title: Cardano stake address
schema.description: Cardano stake address, also known as a reward address.

parameters.description:
The stake address of the user.
Should be a valid Bech32 encoded address followed by the https://cips.cardano.org/cip/CIP-19/#stake-addresses.

parameters.name: network
parameters.description:
Cardano network type.
If omitted network type is identified from the stake address.
If specified it must be correspondent to the network type encoded in the stake
address.
As `preprod` and `preview` network types in the stake address encoded as a
`testnet`, to specify `preprod` or `preview` network type use this
query parameter.

parameters.name: slot_number
parameters.description:
Slot number at which the staked ADA amount should be calculated.
If omitted latest slot number is used.

get.description:
This endpoint returns the registration info followed by the [CIP-36](https://cips.cardano.org/cip/CIP-36/) to the
corresponded user's stake address.

parameters.name: stake_address

schema.title: Cardano stake address
schema.description: Cardano stake address, also known as a reward address.

parameters.description:
The stake address of the user.
Should be a valid Bech32 encoded address followed by the https://cips.cardano.org/cip/CIP-19/#stake-addresses.

parameters.name: network
parameters.description:
Cardano network type.
If omitted network type is identified from the stake address.
If specified it must be correspondent to the network type encoded in the stake
address.
As `preprod` and `preview` network types in the stake address encoded as a
`testnet`, to specify `preprod` or `preview` network type use this
query parameter.

parameters.name: slot_number
parameters.description:
Slot number at which the staked ADA amount should be calculated.
If omitted latest slot number is used.

get.summary: Get Cardano slot info to the provided date-time.
get.description:
This endpoint returns the closest cardano slot info to the provided
date-time.

parameters.name: date_time
parameters.description:
The date-time for which the slot number should be calculated.
If omitted current date time is used.

parameters.name: network
parameters.description:
Cardano network type.
If omitted `mainnet` network type is defined.
As `preprod` and `preview` network types in the stake address encoded as a
`testnet`, to specify `preprod` or `preview` network type use this
query parameter.

get.description:
Get the voter's registration and voting power by their Public Voting Key.
The Public Voting Key must match the voter's most recent valid
[CIP-15](https://cips.cardano.org/cips/cip15) or [CIP-36](https://cips.cardano.org/cips/cip36) registration on-chain.
If the `event_id` query parameter is omitted, then the latest voting power is
retrieved. If the `with_delegators` query parameter is omitted, then
`delegator_addresses` field of `VoterInfo` type does not provided.

parameters.name: voting_key
parameters.description:
A Voters Public ED25519 Key (as registered in their most recent valid
[CIP-15](https://cips.cardano.org/cips/cip15) or [CIP-36](https://cips.cardano.org/cips/cip36) registration).

parameters.name: event_index

schema.title: The Numeric Index of a Voting Event

parameters.description:
The Event Index to return results for.
See [GET Events](Link to events endpoint) for details on retrieving all valid
event IDs.

parameters.name: with_delegators
parameters.description:
If this optional flag is set, the response will include the delegator's list
in the response. Otherwise, it will be omitted.

The fragment ID is the hex-encoded representation of 32 bytes.

## Unauthorized

The client has not sent valid authentication credentials for the requested
resource.

schema.title: RateLimit HTTP header.
schema.description:
Allows this server to advertise its quota policies and the current
service limits, thereby allowing clients to avoid being throttled.

externalDocs.description: IETF Draft - RateLimit header fields for HTTP

422.description:
## Unprocessable Content

The client has not sent valid data in its request, headers, parameters or body.

schema.title: RateLimit HTTP header.
schema.description:
Allows this server to advertise its quota policies and the current
service limits, thereby allowing clients to avoid being throttled.

externalDocs.description: IETF Draft - RateLimit header fields for HTTP

AccountVote.description: Indexes of a proposal that the account has voted for across all active vote plans.

vote_plan_id.title: Unique ID of a vote plan.
vote_plan_id.description: The hex-encoded ID of the vote plan.

votes.description: Array of the proposal numbers voted for by the account ID within the vote plan.

BlockDate.description: Block time defined as the pair (epoch, slot).

CardanoHash.title: CardanoHash
CardanoHash.description: Cardano Blake2b256 hash encoded in hex.

Cip36Info.description: CIP36 Registration Data as found on-chain.

stake_address.description: Full Stake Address (not hashed, 32 byte ED25519 Public key).

slot_no.description: Slot Number the cert is in.

payment_address.description: Full Payment Address (not hashed, 32 byte ED25519 Public key).

is_payable.description: Is the stake address a script or not.

cip36.description: Is the Registration CIP36 format, or CIP15

Cip36ReportingList.description: List of CIP36 Registration Data as found on-chain.

cip36.description: List of registrations associated with the same Voting Key

ContentErrorDetail.description:
Individual details of a single error that was detected with the content of the
request.

example.msg: Value is not a valid dict.

DeepQueryInspectionFlag.description: Enable or Disable Deep Database Query Inspection.

address.description: Delegated Voting Public Key in hex format.

Delegation.description: The Voting power and voting key of a Delegated voter.

power.description: Delegation power assigned to the voting key.

DirectVoter.description: Voting `Key` for a direct voter (not delegated).

Forbidden.description: Server Error response to a Bad request.

id.description: Unique ID of this Server Error so that it can be located easily for debugging.

required.description: List or Roles required to access the resource.

example.msg: Your request was not successful because your authentication credentials do not have the required roles for the requested resource.

fail_fast.description:
Fragments are processed sequentially. If this is true, processing is
stopped after the first error occurs.

FragmentsProcessingSummary.description: Information about whether a message was accepted or rejected.

items.title: Unique ID of a fragment.
items.description:
A fragment is the binary representation of a signed transaction.
The fragment ID is the hex-encoded representation of 32 bytes.

InternalServerError.description: Server Error response to a Bad request.

id.description: Unique ID of this Server Error so that it can be located easily for debugging.

issue.description: A URL to report an issue.

example.msg: Internal Server Error.  Please report the issue to the service owner.

stake_address.description: Full Stake Address (not hashed, 32 byte ED25519 Public key).

payment_address.description: Full Payment Address (not hashed, 32 byte ED25519 Public key).

is_payable.description: Is the stake address a script or not.

cip36.description: Is the Registration CIP36 format, or CIP15

LogLevel.description: Set of all log levels which can be selected.

ReasonRejected.description: The reason for which a fragment was rejected.

allOf.description: Transaction hash in which the [CIP-36](https://cips.cardano.org/cip/CIP-36/) registration is made.

id.title: Unique ID of a fragment.
id.description:
The ID of the rejected fragment.

Currently, the hex encoded bytes that represent the fragment ID. In the
future, this might change to including the prefix "0x".

pool_number.description: The number of the pool that caused this error.

allOf.description: The reason why this fragment was rejected.

dsn.description: The Data Source Name (DSN) for Sentry.

release.description: A version of the code deployed to an environment.

environment.description: The environment in which the application is running, e.g., 'dev', 'qa'.

ServiceUnavailable.description: Server Error response to a Bad request.

id.description: Unique ID of this Server Error so that it can be located easily for debugging.

example.msg: Service Unavailable. Indicates that the server is not ready to handle the request.

slot_number.description: Block's slot number which contains the latest unspent UTXO.

StatusInABlock.description: DEPRECATED: Fragment is included in a block.

allOf.description: Block date at which the fragment was included in a block.
Hash of the block the fragment was included in.

TooManyRequests.description: Server Error response to a Bad request.

id.description: Unique ID of this Server Error so that it can be located easily for debugging.

example.msg: Too Many Requests. You have exceeded the rate limit for this endpoint.

Unauthorized.description: Server Error response to a Bad request.

id.description: Unique ID of this Server Error so that it can be located easily for debugging.

example.msg: Your request was not successful because it lacks valid authentication credentials for the requested resource.

UnprocessableContent.description: Server Error response to a Bad request.

detail.description:
Details of each error in the content that was detected.

Note: This may not be ALL errors in the content, as validation of content can stop
at any point an error is detected.

detail.msg: Value is not a valid dict.

VoterGroupId.description: The kind of voter group foes the voter belong.

voting_power.description:
Voter's voting power.
This is the true voting power, subject to minimum voting power and max cap.

delegations_power.description:
Total voting power delegated to this voter.
This is not capped and not subject to minimum voting power.

delegations_count.description: Number of registration which delegated to this voter.

voting_power_saturation.description:
Voting power's share of the total voting power.
Can be used to gauge potential voting power saturation.
This value is NOT saturated however, and gives the raw share of total registered
voting power.

delegator_addresses.description: List of stake public key addresses which delegated to this voting key.

as_at.description: Date and time the latest snapshot represents.

last_updated.description: Date and time for the latest update to this snapshot information.

final.description:
`True` - this is the final snapshot which will be used for voting power in the
event. `False` - this is an interim snapshot, subject to change.

VotingInfo.description: The type of the Voting Key.

NoAuthorization.description: Endpoint can be used without any authorization.
